ui1Zoom.name: Quick Picker: Zoom Level
ui1Zoom.hint: Scale factor applied to images inside each cell. Values above 1.0 crop and enlarge.

ui1ZoomOrigin.name: Quick Picker: Zoom Origin
ui1ZoomOrigin.hint: Which part of the image stays centred when zoomed. No visible effect at 1.0.

ui2CellWidth.name: Window: Cell Width
ui2CellWidth.hint: Width in pixels of each image cell in the picker window

ui2CellHeight.name: Window: Cell Height
ui2CellHeight.hint: Height in pixels of each image cell in the picker window

ui2DefaultCols.name: Window: Default Columns
ui2DefaultCols.hint: Number of columns on first open

ui2DefaultRows.name: Window: Default Rows
ui2DefaultRows.hint: Number of rows on first open

ui2Zoom.name: Window: Zoom Level
ui2Zoom.hint: Scale factor applied to images inside each cell. Values above 1.0 crop and enlarge.

ui2ZoomOrigin.name: Window: Zoom Origin
ui2ZoomOrigin.hint: Which part of the image stays centred when zoomed. No visible effect at 1.0.

thumbCleaner.name: Clear Thumbnails
thumbCleaner.label: Open Thumbnail Cleaner
thumbCleaner.hint: Remove cached thumbnails for a wildcard path so they are regenerated on next use.

tokenConfig.browse: Browse to a file (then add wildcards manually)

notifications.noImages: Token Slurp: no images found for this wildcard path.

thumbCleaner.title: Thumbnail Cleaner
thumbCleaner.instructions: Enter a wildcard path to find and remove its cached thumbnails. Source image files are never affected.
thumbCleaner.noneFound: No cached thumbnails found for that path.
thumbCleaner.error: An error occurred while searching. Check the console for details.
